page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg9a.64xlarge is an x86_64 architecture bare-metal style instance powered by AMD EPYC 9T25 processors running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The server features 256 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, providing a total of 256 vCPUs without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 1152.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 4.5 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 128 Gbps.

Operating on the KVM hypervisor, the dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent compute performance without resource contention from neighboring tenants. The high core density and 128 Gbps network throughput make this instance qualitatively cost-efficient for large-scale deployments that require massive parallel processing capabilities but do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. The lack of hyperthreading optimizes it for workloads sensitive to cache thrashing or thread scheduling overhead. Suitable workloads include high-performance computing, large-scale web serving, enterprise databases, and distributed analytics.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg9a.64xlarge is a high-density, x86_64 architecture server powered by AMD EPYC 9T25 processors operating at 2.7 GHz. It features 256 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing 256 vCPUs with no hyperthreading. The system is configured with 1152.0 GB of RAM, offering 4.5 GB of memory per core, and lacks local storage and GPU hardware. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 128 Gbps. Operating on a KVM hypervisor with dedicated CPU allocation, this instance delivers predictable, high-throughput compute performance. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for massive parallel processing tasks that do not require local NVMe disks. This server is suited for high-performance computing, large-scale enterprise applications, distributed data processing, and heavy web serving workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg9a.64xlarge is an x86_64 server with 256 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 1152 GB RAM, and 128 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for high-performance parallel computing.

tagline: A high-density compute platform featuring 256 dedicated physical cores and 1152 GB of RAM for massive parallel processing workloads.
